findings.summary: ADR-0048's edit was unmarked while the commit claimed every correction was marked in place — a false claim about the exact discipline being established; now carries the dated exception note
lint and selftest both passed on ZERO files (ADR-0051 §3 quiet-success trap); lintAll now reports a finding when it scans nothing, and the selftest asserts a floor plus an empty-dir-goes-red case

the lint did not catch ADR-0048's own cited shape ('tracked — not yet built') though the header and selftest claimed three shapes; third pattern added, which immediately found a FOURTH live stale claim in ADR-0051:134 (doctor-staleness described as Unbuilt though scenario, test and DEMONSTRATED record all exist)
two of five pinned false-positive sentences were near-verbatim rather than exact; all five now re-grepped and confirmed present verbatim
the ',\s*not here' exemption matched any line as an escape hatch; now anchored to a heading

ADR-0064's rewrite drops its ADR-0050 evidence clause while ADR-0065 keeps its analogue — deliberate: the journal is DEMONSTRATED 3/3 with a 0/3 contrast arm so the condition is discharged, and ADR-0050 binds globally regardless
